src/main/java/app/config/WebSecurityConf.general_idea: Remove dependency on the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter class.
src/main/java/app/config/WebSecurityConf.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in Spring Security 6.0 (Spring Boot 3.0), causing compilation errors if extended.

src/main/java/app/config/WebSecurityConf.general_idea: Replace the overridden configure(HttpSecurity) method with a SecurityFilterChain bean.
src/main/java/app/config/WebSecurityConf.why_exists: Spring Security 6.0 (Spring Boot 3.0) requires security configuration to be defined via SecurityFilterChain beans; the old override method is no longer supported.
src/main/java/app/config/WebSecurityConf.before:
@Override
    protected void configure(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception {
src/main/java/app/config/WebSecurityConf.after:
@Bean
    public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception {

src/main/java/app/config/WebSecurityConf.general_idea: Migrate HttpSecurity configuration from imperative style to lambda DSL.
src/main/java/app/config/WebSecurityConf.why_exists: The imperative style (http.csrf()...) is deprecated and removed in Spring Security 6.0; the lambda DSL (http.csrf(csrf -> ...)) is required for compilation.
src/main/java/app/config/WebSecurityConf.after:
http.csrf(csrf -> csrf.ignoringRequestMatchers(EndpointRequest.toAnyEndpoint()))
                .logout(logout -> logout
                        .logoutSuccessUrl("/")
                        .invalidateHttpSession(true)
                        .clearAuthentication(true)
                        .logoutSuccessHandler(logoutHandler())
                        .logoutRequestMatcher(new AntPathRequestMatcher("/logout"))
                )
                .authorizeHttpRequests(authorize -> authorize
                        .requestMatchers(BASIC_AUTH_ENDPOINT)
                        .hasRole(ADMIN_ROLE)
                        .requestMatchers(EndpointRequest.toAnyEndpoint())
                        .hasRole(ACTUATOR_ROLE)
                        .anyRequest().permitAll()
                )
                .httpBasic();

        return http.build();

src/main/java/app/config/WebSecurityConf.general_idea: Replace antMatchers with requestMatchers in authorization rules.
src/main/java/app/config/WebSecurityConf.why_exists: antMatchers is deprecated and removed in Spring Security 6.0; requestMatchers is the required replacement for defining request matching rules.

src/main/java/app/config/WebSecurityConf.general_idea: Replace authorizeRequests with authorizeHttpRequests in authorization rules.
src/main/java/app/config/WebSecurityConf.why_exists: authorizeRequests is deprecated and removed in Spring Security 6.0; authorizeHttpRequests is the required replacement method.

src/main/java/app/config/WebSecurityConf.general_idea: Add ConditionalOnWebApplication annotation to ensure security config only loads in web applications.
src/main/java/app/config/WebSecurityConf.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.0 / Spring Security 6.0 best practices and potential runtime issues if security config is loaded in non-web contexts (e.g., tests or non-web profiles) without this condition.

src/main/java/com/mpalourdio/springboott.general_idea: Add wildcard type parameter to private ResponseEntity return type to resolve raw type usage.
src/main/java/com/mpalourdio/springboott.why_exists: Java compiler error or warning regarding unchecked assignment or raw type usage when the method is called and assigned to a typed variable.

src/main/java/com/mpalourdio/springboott.general_idea: Replace explicit HttpEntity type declaration with var to use local variable type inference.
Add wildcard type parameter to public ResponseEntity return type to resolve raw type usage.
src/main/java/com/mpalourdio/springboott.why_exists: Java compiler error or warning regarding unchecked assignment or raw type usage.

src/main/java/com/mpalourdio/springboott.general_idea: Add wildcard type parameter to public ResponseEntity return type to resolve raw type usage.
src/main/java/com/mpalourdio/springboott.why_exists: Java compiler error or warning regarding unchecked assignment or raw type usage.

src/main/java/com/mpalourdio/springboott.general_idea: Replace raw Map return type with parameterized Map<String, Boolean> to resolve unchecked assignment warnings or errors in stricter Java/Spring Boot environments.
src/main/java/com/mpalourdio/springboott.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x (and newer Spring Framework versions) enforces stricter type checking; returning a raw Map while assigning a parameterized Map instance can trigger compile-time errors or severe warnings depending on project configuration (e.g., -Werror).

src/main/java/com/mpalourdio/springboott.general_idea: Remove unused import for the Task entity class.
Remove unused import for the List interface.
Replace explicit List type declaration with var in indexAction method.
Replace explicit List type declaration with var in otherAction method.
Remove unused import of ResponseEntity to clean up the source file.
Replace explicit HttpEntity type declaration with var to leverage local variable type inference.
Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet imports to align with Spring Boot 3.0's migration to Jakarta EE 9+.
src/main/java/com/mpalourdio/springboott.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+; using them causes ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime on Spring Boot 3.0.

src/main/java/com/mpalourdio/springboott.general_idea: Remove unused imports for HSSFCell, HSSFRow, and HSSFSheet that are no longer referenced in the controller code.
Migrate JPA EntityManager import from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
src/main/java/com/mpalourdio/springboott.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.0 (required for Java 17+ modern stack) uses Jakarta EE 9+ APIs; javax.persistence classes are no longer available, causing a compile error.

src/main/java/com/mpalourdio/springboott.general_idea: Migrate JPA persistence annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Spring Boot 3.0 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
src/main/java/com/mpalourdio/springboott.why_exists: The javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code using it will fail to compile on JDK 17 with Spring Boot 3.0.

src/main/java/com/mpalourdio/springboott.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence for Jakarta EE 9+ compatibility.
src/main/java/com/mpalourdio/springboott.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.0+), causing compile errors.

src/main/java/com/mpalourdio/springboott.general_idea: Replace Hibernate-specific CurrentTimestampFunction constant with a literal string for the column default value.
src/main/java/com/mpalourdio/springboott.why_exists: The internal Hibernate class CurrentTimestampFunction may be inaccessible or removed in newer Hibernate versions bundled with Spring Boot 3, causing compile errors.

src/main/java/com/mpalourdio/springboott.general_idea: Remove unused import for Hibernate internal class.
Migrate JPA persistence annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
src/main/java/com/mpalourdio/springboott.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.0 requires Jakarta EE 9+ APIs; javax.persistence classes are no longer available on the classpath, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/mpalourdio/springboott.general_idea: Remove deprecated @ConstructorBinding annotation from configuration properties class.
Remove the deprecated @ConstructorBinding annotation from the configuration properties class.
src/main/java/com/mpalourdio/springboott.why_exists: The @ConstructorBinding annotation was deprecated in Spring Boot 2.6 and removed in Spring Boot 3.0; its presence causes a compilation error in Spring Boot 3.0+ because the class no longer exists.
